post.content:
Hi Community,

I appeared in round 2 of the uber onsite interview today. I have already given round 1. The questions in those rounds were Leetcode medium questions. I thought that I had performed well in those interviews. For the first round, I received very positive feedback. And in the second round, I explained the logic well and then wrote the code with one mistake that I corrected instantly. 
I got a feedback call from the recruiter for the second round where she mentioned that she is seeing some red flags like I took a lot of time while explaining and my code was not precise and concise. 
Does this mean that I dont have any chance of getting selected? I have two more rounds in the line.
How did you prepare for low-level design, specifically how should one approach lld problems?\n
Hey did you get a call for the second round?
